sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: UBS Nudges Booking Holdings (BKNG) Price Target by $1
feed.summary: UBS raised its price target on Booking Holdings (BKNG) from $259 to $260 and maintained a Buy rating, anticipating near-term uncertainty from geopolitical risks but expecting normalization by 2027. Separately, Deutsche Bank adjusted its price target to $210 after BKNG's 25-to-1 stock split, noting mixed travel signals and potential European softness. Booking Holdings, known for brands like Booking.com and Priceline, is facing downward pressure on its stock price.

feed.title: When is Amazon Prime Day 2026? Amazon confirms June sale
feed.summary: Amazon has confirmed that its Prime Day 2026 event will take place in June, earlier than its usual July timeframe. While exact dates are yet to be announced, this shift means shoppers should prepare for deals sooner, with early discounts expected to start in late May or early June. Prime Day deals are exclusive to Amazon Prime members, and the article provides information on membership benefits and discounted options.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies (NYSE:TYL) has issued its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting an EPS of $12.50-$12.75 and revenue of $2.5 billion-$2.6 billion, surpassing consensus EPS estimates. Following the announcement, the company's stock rose by 4.6%. The article also details recent analyst ratings, insider transactions, and institutional ownership changes for TYL.

feed.title: 30 Years of Million Mile Drivers: How J.B. Hunt Recognizes Safety and Raises the Bar
feed.summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services Inc. celebrated its 30th annual Million Mile celebration, honoring 54 drivers for achieving between 2 and 5 million accident-free miles. This event highlights the company's commitment to safety and recognizes drivers who demonstrate exceptional focus and discipline on the road. The celebration included time with company leadership, a Walk of Fame, and the etching of drivers' names onto the Million Mile Wall.

feed.title: AI and Cloud push Alphabet into a new phase of growth
feed.summary: Alphabet's Q1 2026 results show a strong performance driven by its core advertising business and impressive growth in Google Cloud, fueled by AI investments. The company's revenue reached $109.9 billion, with operating income up 30% year-on-year, demonstrating increased efficiency despite high capital expenditure. This performance positions Alphabet as a more diversified technology platform, with AI becoming a significant driver of financial success beyond its traditional advertising dominance.

feed.title: Vertex Director Upadhyay to Step Down Amid CFO Move
feed.summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals announced that director Suketu Upadhyay will not seek re-election at the company’s 2026 annual meeting due to a new role as CFO of Incyte Corporation. The board size will consequently reduce to ten members. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates VRTX as "Outperform" based on strong fundamentals and a positive earnings outlook, despite technical momentum and earnings volatility concerns.

feed.title: A Look at Devon Energy Corp (DVN) After 3.2% Gain -- GF Value $4
feed.summary: Devon Energy Corp (DVN) shares recently rose by 3.2% to $51.08, but GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates the stock is 4.7% overvalued compared to its estimated fair value of $48.80. Despite an above-average GF Score™ of 73/100, highlighting strengths in profitability and valuation, the overvaluation and low momentum rank suggest caution for investors. The company's P/E ratio of 12.2x is also significantly higher than its 5-year median, further supporting the overvaluation assessment.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 55,917,468 Blackstone shares (BX) — 7.53% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 7.53% stake in Blackstone Inc. (BX), amounting to 55,917,468 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares, but sole voting power over 7,607,674 shares, clarifying the distinction in control rights across its various entities and funds. The filing emphasizes transparency regarding institutional ownership and its implications for corporate governance.

feed.title: Dow Inc (DOW) Shares Surge 4.0% -- What GF Score of 64 Tells Inv
feed.summary: Dow Inc (DOW) shares surged 4.0% to $39.55 on April 29, 2026. Despite a GF Score™ of 64/100, indicating above-average potential, the GF Value™ suggests the stock is 2.1% overvalued. The article highlights that while DOW's forward P/E is below its historical median, the lack of insider transactions over the last three months signals a cautious stance from executives regarding its current price levels.

feed.title: D.R. Horton Inc (DHI) Shares Fall 3.0% -- What GF Score of 93 Tells Investors
feed.summary: D.R. Horton Inc (DHI) shares recently fell 3.0%, closing at $151.65, though the stock has seen significant gains over the past year. GuruFocus's GF Value™ indicates DHI is slightly overvalued, trading 0.6% above its intrinsic value of $150.75, with its current P/E ratio of 14.2x notably higher than its 5-year median. Despite this, DHI holds a strong GF Score™ of 93/100, driven by excellent profitability and growth ratings, but insider activity has been neutral, suggesting a cautious outlook.

feed.title: Vanguard reports 7.69M shares in Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 7,688,703 shares, representing 7.34% of Camden Property Trust's common stock, through a SCHEDULE 13G SEC filing. This filing indicates that Vanguard holds sole voting power for 976,870 shares and sole dispositive power for all 7,688,703 shares. The document was signed by Ashley Grim, Head of Global Fund Administration, on April 29, 2026.

feed.title: Equinix stock plunges as Q1 earnings fall short of expectations (EQIX:NASDAQ)
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) stock declined after its first-quarter earnings missed analyst estimates, despite the company raising its full-year guidance. Shares were down 5.24% in after-market trading on Wednesday. The data center REIT reported adjusted FFO per share for Q1 that fell short of expectations.

feed.title: FMC Corp. stock underperforms Wednesday when compared to competitors
feed.summary: FMC Corp. (FMC) stock fell 4.00% to $14.65 on Wednesday, underperforming the broader market. This marked the stock's second consecutive day of losses, as the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also experienced declines.

feed.title: A Look At State Street (STT) Valuation As Tokenized Fund Platform And Nasdaq 100 ETF Plans Progress
feed.summary: State Street (STT) is planning to launch a tokenized fund servicing platform by the end of 2026 and has also announced a new Nasdaq 100 ETF. While analysts view STT as slightly overvalued with a fair value of $148.46, Simply Wall St's DCF model suggests it might be undervalued at $178.02 compared to its current price of $152.48. The article highlights both the opportunities and risks associated with these new ventures and the conflicting valuation perspectives.

feed.title: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) EVP Peter Sefzik Sells 20,000 Shares
feed.summary: Fifth Third Bancorp's EVP Peter Sefzik sold 20,000 shares of the company's stock for over $1 million, reducing his holdings by 9.55%. This occurred after the bank reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $0.83 EPS and announcing a $0.40 quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $57.11 for FITB.

feed.title: Welltower Inc. (WELL) Announces Resale and OP Unit Prospectus Su
feed.summary: Welltower Inc. (WELL) announced filings with the SEC to register up to 138,740 shares of common stock for resale, issued in exchange for securities from recent property acquisitions. Additionally, the company registered up to 176,172 common shares for potential issuance if holders of Welltower OP LLC's Class A common units tender them for redemption. These actions are part of Welltower's financial strategy to manage equity and support growth through acquisitions.

feed.title: A £2 million legacy for Fife's future generations
feed.summary: ExxonMobil is donating up to £2 million in industrial equipment to Fife College, marking a final contribution as its Fife Ethylene Plant (FEP) ceases production. This equipment will support hands-on learning and skill development for future generations of students in Fife, enhancing their job readiness in various technical fields. The generous gift aims to leave a lasting legacy for the community that supported FEP for over 40 years.

feed.title: First Mid Names Matt Smith CEO and President; Joe Dively to
feed.summary: First Mid Bancshares, Inc. announced a leadership transition, naming Matthew K. Smith as the new CEO and President, effective July 1, 2026. The current Chairman and CEO, Joseph R. Dively, will transition to Executive Chairman of the Board. This succession plan follows a multi-year process and aims to ensure continued growth and stability for the company.

feed.title: Matt Smith to succeed Dively as First Mid (NASDAQ: FMBH) CEO
feed.summary: First Mid Bancshares, Inc. announced a leadership transition, naming Matthew K. Smith as the new Chief Executive Officer and President, effective July 1, 2026. Current CEO Joseph R. Dively will transition to Executive Chair, focusing on strategic oversight and mergers and acquisitions. Smith, currently President, has been instrumental in the company's growth, with total assets increasing from $2.8 billion to $9.3 billion during his tenure.

feed.title: Gartner: Supply chain orgs struggle to add AI onto legacy systems
feed.summary: A Gartner survey found that 56% of chief supply chain officers face significant challenges integrating AI with legacy systems and processes. The report highlights that simply bolting AI onto old infrastructure often locks in existing inefficiencies rather than driving substantial improvements. Leading CSCOs are reimagining entire supply chain operating models, team roles, and technology layers to build "AI-native" supply chains for greater impact.

feed.title: Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX): Stephen Mandel Opens New Position in Medical Device Firm
feed.summary: Stephen Mandel's Lone Pine Capital has initiated a new position in Boston Scientific Corporation (BSX) during the fourth quarter of 2025, acquiring over 200,000 shares. Despite the company beating Q1 estimates for revenue and EPS, a lowered full-year 2026 guidance led to stock price volatility, which some hedge funds interpret as a strategic move to set up future beat-and-raise quarters. The article highlights strong organic growth in BSX's Cardiovascular segment and the success of its Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) platform and WATCHMAN device.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (NASDAQ: BKNG) holds 2.4M shares, 7.56%
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 2,396,591 shares in Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BKNG), representing 7.56% of the class. This disclosure, made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 320,155 shares. The filing provides transparency on institutional ownership but does not detail acquisition or sale transactions.

feed.title: Mizuho cuts GE HealthCare stock price target on macro concerns
feed.summary: Mizuho has reduced its price target for GE HealthCare (NASDAQ:GEHC) shares from $90 to $80, while maintaining an Outperform rating, citing macro concerns despite the stock appearing undervalued at current levels. The company reiterated its organic revenue growth guidance of 3% to 4% and adjusted its EPS outlook to $4.80-$5.00, factoring in slight second-half improvements. Recent hospital capital surveys show stable demand for imaging equipment, and GE HealthCare is exploring options for its PCS segment and pursuing tariff reimbursement for cash upside.

feed.title: SLB (SLB) CEO Olivier Le Peuch sells 25,000 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: SLB's CEO, Olivier Le Peuch, sold 25,000 shares of common stock at $56.48 per share, a transaction conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on March 25, 2025. Following this sale, Le Peuch retains 1,391,328 direct shares of SLB. This sale represents a relatively small portion of his overall holdings, indicating a routine, pre-planned insider transaction.

feed.title: Is Duke Energy (DUK) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Recent Share Gains?
feed.summary: Duke Energy (DUK) has seen recent share gains but a mixed short-term performance. A Dividend Discount Model (DDM) analysis suggests the stock is overvalued by 63.3%, indicating an intrinsic value of US$78.25 compared to its market price of US$127.80. However, its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio of 20.28x is below industry and peer averages, and Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio" of 24.99x, suggesting it might be undervalued based on earnings multiples. Investors are encouraged to consider various narratives and factors beyond simplified models for a comprehensive valuation.

feed.title: KLA Corp forecasts strong quarterly revenue on AI-linked demand By Reuters
feed.summary: KLA Corp projects strong quarterly revenue driven by increased demand for its chipmaking tools fueled by the artificial intelligence sector. The company's fourth-quarter revenue forecast of $3.58 billion, exceeded analysts' estimates. Despite the positive outlook, KLA's shares dropped over 7% in extended trading, having previously gained about 50% this year.

feed.title: Northern Trust(NTRS.US) Officer Sells US$3.32 Million in Common Stock
feed.summary: A Northern Trust (NTRS.US) officer, Stephen N. Potter, recently sold 40,782 shares of common stock for a total value of approximately US$3.32 million. The transactions occurred at an average price of US$81.56 per share. Following these sales, Potter still directly owns 75,417 shares of Northern Trust.

feed.title: Equinix Declares Quarterly Dividend on Its Common Stock
feed.summary: Equinix, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $5.16 per share on its common stock. This dividend will be paid on June 17, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 20, 2026. The company, known for its digital infrastructure and data center footprint, emphasizes its role in connecting global economies and empowering innovation.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Real Estate Companies: American Tower (AMT) and Welltower (WELL)
feed.summary: BMO Capital analyst Ari Klein maintained a Hold rating on American Tower (AMT) with a $200 price target, while TipRanks – PerPlexity downgraded it to Hold with a $191 price target. Bank of America Securities analyst Farrell Granath maintained a Buy rating on Welltower (WELL), aligning with a Strong Buy consensus, with Jefferies also reaffirming a Buy rating and a $375 price target. The article highlights analyst sentiment and price targets for these two real estate companies.

feed.title: First Horizon Shareholders Back Board, Governance Adjustments
feed.summary: First Horizon shareholders have supported the company's board and governance adjustments, endorsing all director nominees and executive pay. The board recently amended its bylaws to reduce its size, signaling a move towards a leaner governance structure. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates FHN as Outperform, citing solid financial performance and an optimistic outlook.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] BAXTER INTERNATIONAL INC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has filed a Schedule 13G indicating a passive investment in Baxter International Inc, beneficially owning 38,033,907 shares of Common Stock, which represents 7.36% of the class. Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 4,526,932 shares. This filing signifies a non-activist ownership stake.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management (AVY) discloses 7.53% ownership of Avery Dennison
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed a 7.53% beneficial ownership stake in Avery Dennison Corp (AVY), totaling 5,795,652 shares as of March 31, 2026. This Schedule 13G filing indicates passive investment, with Vanguard holding sole voting power for 785,945 shares and sole dispositive power for all 5,795,652 shares. The report, signed on April 29, 2026, aggregates holdings across various Vanguard entities and affiliates.

feed.title: Medtronic wins FDA approval for updated mitral replacement valve
feed.summary: Medtronic has received FDA approval for its new Mosaic Neo bioprosthetic mitral valve and has launched the device in the U.S. This next-generation valve builds on the original Mosaic platform and is designed for implantation via sternotomy or minimally invasive surgery. Initial implants have already been performed across the U.S., including the first robotic implantation, and the device will be officially launched at the upcoming American Association for Thoracic Surgeons annual meeting.

feed.title: Director at Jabil (NYSE: JBL) receives 600 RSUs vesting in 2027
feed.summary: Jabil Inc. director John C. Plant was granted 600 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as part of the company's 2021 Equity Incentive Plan. These RSUs, which vest on January 22, 2027, represent future shares of Jabil common stock and increase his direct holdings to 6,500 shares. This transaction is considered a routine, compensation-related increase in his equity position rather than an open-market purchase.

feed.title: Vanguard (NYSE: CAH) holds 17.6M shares, a 7.49% stake
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a beneficial ownership of 17,635,857 shares, equaling a 7.49% stake, in Cardinal Health (CAH) through a Schedule 13G filing. This passive investment indicates sole dispositive power over all shares and sole voting power over 2,347,148 shares. The filing was signed on April 29, 2026, with the reporting period ending March 31, 2026.

feed.title: Equinix (EQIX) Q1 2026: EPS $4.20 vs $4.26 Est. (miss), Revenue
feed.summary: Equinix (EQIX) reported Q1 2026 revenues of $2.444 billion and diluted EPS of $4.20, both falling short of analyst estimates of $2.516 billion and $4.26, respectively. Despite the miss, the company saw recurring revenue growth, expanded margins, and record bookings and backlog, leading to a raised full-year 2026 guidance. GuruFocus values EQIX as modestly overvalued by 22.3%, highlighting strong growth and profitability but moderate financial strength.

feed.title: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) EVP reports 5,314-share trust move
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories Executive Vice President Mary K. Moreland reported a discretionary transaction involving 5,314 common shares in a Profit Sharing Trust at $94.41 per share. Following this transaction, she indirectly holds 17,159 shares in the trust and directly holds 104,291 common shares, as detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing dated April 29, 2026, for activity on April 28, 2026.

feed.title: Aflac (AFL) Q1 2026: Adjusted EPS $1.75 vs $1.79 Est (Miss), Revenue $4.346B vs $4.226B Est (Beat) -- Is the Stock 18.8% Overvalued?
feed.summary: Aflac (AFL) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, with adjusted diluted EPS of $1.75, missing the estimated $1.79, but revenue beat expectations at $4.346 billion against an estimated $4.226 billion. The company saw a 27.9% year-over-year increase in total revenues and returned $1.3 billion to shareholders through buybacks and dividends. Despite strong performance in Japan and U.S. premium growth, GuruFocus considers the stock 18.8% overvalued based on its GF Value.

feed.title: United Airlines Holdings Inc. stock outperforms competitors despite losses on the day
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings Inc. (UAL) shares fell 1.98% to $88.62 on Wednesday, marking its third consecutive day of losses. This occurred during an overall poor trading session where the S&P 500 Index and Dow Jones Industrial Average also declined. Despite the drop, the article states UAL's stock "outperforms competitors" but does not provide specific comparative data.

feed.title: KLA Corp. Stock Slides On Q3 Earnings: What Investors Should Know
feed.summary: KLA Corp. (NASDAQ: KLAC) shares slid by nearly 9% in after-hours trading despite the company reporting better-than-expected Q3 revenues and adjusted EPS. The company's Q4 guidance for revenue and EPS also came in above analyst estimates, driven by strong business momentum and positioning within the AI ecosystem. KLA Corp. executives are set to discuss the quarter further on an earnings call at 5 p.m. ET.

feed.title: Everest Group: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: Everest Group (EG) reported a first-quarter profit of $653 million, or $16.21 per share. Adjusted earnings of $16.08 per share surpassed analyst estimates of $14.03 per share. However, the reinsurance company's revenue of $4.07 billion fell short of the $4.41 billion expected by analysts.

feed.title: Pool Expands Buyback Program and Increases Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: Pool Corporation (POOL) has increased its share repurchase authorization by $329 million, bringing the total to $600 million, and raised its quarterly dividend by 4% to $1.30 per share. These actions reflect the company's confidence in future growth and commitment to shareholder value. Additionally, shareholders re-elected nine directors, ratified Ernst & Young as auditor, and approved executive compensation at their annual meeting.

feed.title: FormFactor (NASDAQ:FORM) Reports Q1 In Line With Expectations, Stock Jumps 12.6%
feed.summary: FormFactor (NASDAQ:FORM) reported first-quarter revenue that met Wall Street expectations, with sales up 32% year-on-year to $226.1 million. The company also surpassed analyst estimates for non-GAAP profit and provided strong revenue and EPS guidance for the second quarter, leading to a 12.6% jump in its stock. Despite mediocre annualized revenue growth over five years, recent performance and outlook suggest an acceleration in demand for the semiconductor testing company.

feed.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says the “most noble” career is this
feed.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang, recently honored with the IEEE Medal of Honor, stated that engineering is the "most noble" career. He believes engineers are the foundation of society, transforming ideas into reality by solving complex problems. Despite AI reshaping various professions, Huang maintains that engineering remains one of the most vital career paths.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (ORLY) O'Reilly Automotive Posts Q1 EPS $0.72, vs. FactSet Est of $0.70
feed.summary: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) announced Q1 EPS of $0.72, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $0.70. The company also reported Q1 revenue of $4.56 billion, exceeding the FactSet estimate of $4.46 billion. This financial performance indicates stronger-than-expected results for the automotive parts distributor.

feed.title: FMC: Q1 Earnings Snapshot
feed.summary: FMC Corp. (FMC) reported a first-quarter loss of $281.3 million, or $2.25 per share. Adjusted for one-time costs, the loss was 23 cents per share, which surpassed Wall Street expectations of a 39-cent loss. The chemical producer also beat revenue forecasts, posting $758.6 million against an expected $721.8 million.

feed.title: SLB gibt Ergebnisse des ersten Quartals 2026 bekannt
feed.summary: SLB (NYSE: SLB) hat heute die Ergebnisse für das erste Quartal 2026 bekannt gegeben. Das Unternehmen verzeichnete einen Umsatz von 8,50 Milliarden Dollar. Der Konflikt im Nahen Osten hatte Auswirkungen auf die Geschäftstätigkeit, insbesondere in den Segmenten Bohranlagen und Lagerstättendienstleistungen. Trotz dieser Herausforderungen wies SLB ein starkes Wachstum in Digital- und Lösungen für Rechenzentren auf, gestützt durch strategische Initiativen und Partnerschaften mit Unternehmen wie NVIDIA.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Globe Life (NYSE:GL) CEO Sells 4,663 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Globe Life CEO James Matthew Darden sold 4,663 shares of company stock on April 28th for approximately $717,542, reducing his ownership by 7.39%. This sale follows earlier transactions in March and February, totaling 32,508 shares sold year-to-date for about $4.75 million. The company recently reported slightly missed Q1 EPS

feed.title: Flutter Entertainment (FLUT) Downgraded to Neutral at MoffettNathanson
feed.summary: MoffettNathanson downgraded Flutter Entertainment plc (NYSE:FLUT) from Buy to Neutral, reducing its price target to $127 from $170, citing that attractive valuations alone aren't sufficient to maintain a Buy rating despite significant year-to-date selloffs. Separately, Truist lowered Flutter's price target to $140 from $160 but maintained a Buy rating, noting the gaming sector remains out of favor with regional operators best positioned. The digital segment faces challenges from slowing online sports betting growth and prediction market uncertainties.

feed.title: Chipotle Heats Up As Sales Top Estimates — Stock Jumps
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (CMG) reported first-quarter earnings in line with analyst expectations, with revenue of $3.09 billion surpassing estimates. The company's "Recipe for Growth" strategy contributed to this success, with diluted earnings per share at 23 cents and adjusted diluted earnings per share at 24 cents. Following the report, Chipotle's stock saw a 6.52% jump in extended trading on Wednesday.
